title: PE8 6LR, PURE FUELS LIMITED: permit surrender issued - EPR/VP3239YL/S002
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter for:   Operator name: PURE FUELS LIMITED Installation name: Stibbington Biodiesel Permit number: EPR/VP3239YL/S002  "
